channel.title: Github on Jakob Külzer
channel.description: Recent content in Github on Jakob Külzer

item.title: Goodbye, Github Pages
item.author: jakob.kuelzer@gmail.com (Jakob Külzer)
item.description: After many years my blog has moved from github pages to a new domain. You can now visit my blog at https://kuelzer.ca. I will leave this version of the blog up for now, but it will not receive any further updates. So check out the new website at https://kuelzer.ca!
